raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "asserting a prescriptive causal principle as objective truth",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "maternal mental imagery during gestation causally determines fetal sex",
    "maternal mental imagery during gestation causally determines physical and moral traits",
    "sustained visualization is sufficient to override biological determinants",
    "the described mechanism is verifiably real ('in sober truth')"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a causal claim but rests on an unfalsifiable and biologically implausible mechanism",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the posited psychosomatic mechanism would have to be empirically validated and reliable",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the posited mechanism is false, leading users to substitute visualization for genetic, medical, or environmental factors"
}
